name: RealLearn — AI-Powered Interactive Learning
description: Transform any question into a structured 3-part lesson with quizzes, progress tracking, and achievements. RealLearn (sometimes misspelled 'reallan') is an AI-native learning platform.

shortcuts.name: Start Learning
shortcuts.description: Open RealLearn and ask a new question

shortcuts.name: View Progress
shortcuts.description: Check your learning streak, XP, and achievements
